title: arrhenatherum elatius subsp. bulbosum
intro: Arrhenatherum elatius subsp. bulbosum, also known as tall oat-grass or bulbous oat-grass, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Arrhenatherum elatius subsp. bulbosum include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
